notes: NEW master row (candidate, NOT yet authored) | country=Brazil; source_url=https://www.biblioteca.presidencia.gov.br/presidencia/ex-presidentes/luiz-inacio-lula-da-silva/discursos; source_name=Biblioteca da Presidencia da Republica (ex-presidentes); source_type=official_gov; region=Latin America; iso3n=76; content_format=pdf. The Biblioteca da Presidencia is the official archive of EX-PRESIDENTS' speeches (FHC, Lula I-II 2003-2010, Dilma, Temer, Bolsonaro) and is the ONLY source reaching the Lula I-II era (2003-2010), which bra_planalto_old_wayback (2011+) does not. BLOCKED here for two reasons found 2026-07-09: (1) the live origin resets connections from this network (httpx RemoteProtocolError 'Server disconnected'; chromium net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET; also a broken TLS cert chain) -> likely geo/IP-fenced; may be scrapable from a Brazilian IP. (2) The speeches are stored as PDF files (/discursos/<mandato>/<year>/DD-MM-YYYY-discurso-...pdf/view + /@@download/file/...), which the current HTML text_scraper cannot parse -> needs a PDF-extraction stage the engine doesn't yet have. The Internet Archive HAS ~1,994 captures of this tree (reachable via CDX), so a wayback recipe could enumerate them, but the payload is still PDF. FIX/FOLLOW-UP: add a PDF-extraction capability, then author bra_biblioteca[_wayback] over the ex-presidentes/<name>/discursos prefix (one per ex-president; the URL carries the DD-MM-YYYY date). Deferred, not a full run.
